title: plumeria alba
intro: Plumeria alba, also known as the white frangipani or white plumeria, is a fragrant and beautiful flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The medicinal properties of Plumeria alba include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which make it effective in treating various health conditions. The plant is also known to have several health benefits, including reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and even helping to lower blood pressure. Plumeria alba can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to promote relaxation and overall well-being.
